meta.name: Dawn of the Crystals (FF5 Jobs)
meta.source: Inspired by Final Fantasy V: the four elemental crystals, world-map adventure, and the bright job-system era
meta.tokenConvention: Every color key maps to a CSS custom property named --<key>. e.g. "accent" -> var(--accent). The group names (surfaces, lines, text, accents, crystals, states) are for human organization only and are NOT part of the variable name. The four crystal-* tokens are extra identity colors; wire them up where supported.
meta.notExportedYet: Non-color tokens still live only in styles.css and are intentionally omitted here: --radius, --radius-s, --shadow. For stronger FF5 identity, consider subtle diagonal wind-texture overlays and tiny prismatic glints on hover states when non-color tokens are supported.

bg.desc: Meteor-stained dusk over the FF5 horizon

bg-soft.desc: Header elevation with ember dusk warmth

panel.desc: Primary panel in warm brick-brown adventure tone

panel-2.desc: Raised controls with richer sunset contrast

panel-3.desc: Highest elevation with fiery crystal-lit warmth

line.desc: Warm parchment-gold frame line for crisp separation

line-soft.desc: Softer ember divider for internal structure

text.desc: High-clarity text over deep sunset surfaces

muted.desc: Secondary labels with warm dusk tone

accent.desc: Job-system energy green for primary interaction

gold.desc: Relic/gil gold for totals and headers

crystal-earth.desc: Earth Crystal analog - vivid growth green

crystal-fire.desc: Fire Crystal analog - energetic flame orange

done.desc: Completed progression tied to Earth crystal

done-dk.desc: Darker completion tone for layered visuals
